Package org.javalabs.jpa.txn

package org.javalabs.jpa.txn
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.javalabs.jpa
     
  • Class
    Description
    DBProxy
    Abstract claass for all handlers.
    Injector
    Central component responsible for dependency injection and object provisioning.
    LitePersistenceContext
    Interface to represent a persistence context.
    PersistenceContextImpl
    Platfor provided implementation of LitePersistenceContext.
    ProxyStore
    This is the class where all the proxy objects will be kept.
    PUInjector
    Injector implementation that integrates dependency injection with a JPA persistence unit.
    TransactionalProxy
    Dynamic proxy for database connection and transaction management.
    TxnEntityManagerDelegate
    Delegate wrapper around an EntityManager that adds transaction-aware behavior.
